name: axiom
description: A curated marketplace of plugins for Claude Code, built from first principles.

plugins.name: axiom-git
plugins.description: Composes Conventional Commits messages with gitmoji from the staged diff, with safety gates for protected branches, staged secrets, and pre-commit hooks.

plugins.name: axiom-versioning
plugins.description: Audits and updates external versioned dependencies across application, infrastructure, and CI/CD configurations.
